name: Charles University (UK)
tuitionNote: Czech-taught FREE; English: EUR 1,020-24,330/yr depending on faculty (Medicine ~EUR 14,000/yr). QS #265.
bachelorRequirements: 12yr secondary + nostrification + IELTS 6.0-6.5 + faculty entrance exam. BD/PK/IN: HSC/Intermediate + apostilled docs.
masterRequirements: Bachelor degree (min 3yr/180 ECTS) + IELTS 6.5 + entrance exam. BD/PK/IN: recognised BSc + transcript apostille.

name: Czech Technical University in Prague (CVUT)
localName: Ceske vysoke uceni technicke v Praze (CVUT)
tuitionNote: Czech-taught FREE; English: CZK 128,000/yr (~EUR 5,120/yr). Application fee CZK 900. QS #416.
bachelorRequirements: 12yr secondary + nostrification + IELTS 6.0 + maths/physics entrance exam. BD/PK/IN: HSC with maths.
masterRequirements: BSc in engineering/science + IELTS 6.0-6.5 + TOEFL 88 + entrance exam. BD/PK/IN: recognised BSc.

name: Masaryk University (MU)
tuitionNote: Czech-taught FREE; English: ~CZK 91,700/yr (~EUR 3,500-5,000/yr) depending on faculty. Medicine ~EUR 12,200/yr. QS #430.
bachelorRequirements: 12yr secondary + nostrification + IELTS 6.0-6.5 + entrance exam (varies by faculty). BD/PK/IN: HSC + apostilled docs.
masterRequirements: Bachelor (180 ECTS) + IELTS 6.5 + entrance exam. BD/PK/IN: recognised BSc + transcript.

name: Brno University of Technology (BUT)
tuitionNote: Czech-taught FREE; English: EUR 3,000-4,000/yr (varies by faculty: FIT EUR 4,000, FME EUR 3,000). QS #575.
bachelorRequirements: 12yr secondary + nostrification + IELTS 6.0 + maths entrance exam. BD/PK/IN: HSC with maths/science.
masterRequirements: BSc in relevant engineering field + IELTS 6.0 + entrance exam. BD/PK/IN: recognised BSc.

name: University of Chemistry and Technology Prague (UCT)
tuitionNote: Czech-taught FREE; English: ~EUR 3,200-3,600/yr. Strong in chemistry, food science, materials. QS #638.

masterRequirements: BSc in chemistry/related field + IELTS 6.0 + entrance exam. BD/PK/IN: recognised BSc.

name: University of Defence (UNOB)
tuitionNote: State military university. Free for military personnel. Limited international access - bilateral agreements only.
bachelorRequirements: Military service commitment + secondary education + physical/medical exams. Not generally open to non-EU civilians.
masterRequirements: BSc + military service + special approval. Not generally open to non-EU civilians.

name: Police Academy of the Czech Republic (PA CR)
tuitionNote: State police academy. Free for police/security personnel. Limited international access via bilateral agreements.
bachelorRequirements: Security service commitment + secondary education + physical/medical exams. Not generally open to international students.
masterRequirements: BSc + security service + special approval. Not generally open to international students.

name: Anglo-American University (AAU)
tuitionNote: All programs in English. ~EUR 5,000-6,000/yr. American-style liberal arts education. US-accredited.
bachelorRequirements: 12yr secondary + IELTS 6.0 / TOEFL 79 + application essay + interview. BD/PK/IN: HSC + English proficiency.
masterRequirements: Bachelor degree + IELTS 6.5 / TOEFL 90 + CV + motivation letter. BD/PK/IN: recognised BSc.

name: University of New York in Prague (UNYP)
localName: University of New York in Prague (UNYP)
tuitionNote: All English. American BSc ~EUR 9,000/yr; European BSc ~EUR 4,800/yr; MBA ~EUR 4,200/yr. Student body fee EUR 250/sem.
bachelorRequirements: 12yr secondary + IELTS 6.0 / TOEFL 79 + application + interview. BD/PK/IN: HSC + English proficiency.
masterRequirements: Bachelor degree + IELTS 6.5 + CV + motivation letter. BD/PK/IN: recognised BSc.

masterRequirements: Bachelor degree + IELTS 6.0 + entrance exam. BD/PK/IN: recognised BSc.

masterRequirements: Bachelor degree + IELTS 6.5 + CV + references. BD/PK/IN: recognised BSc.
